title: Customize name tag in form submissions
excerpt: Within our team, we leverage forms for all of our resourcing requests. I would like to be able to select the column entries that will appear as the item name rather that either seeing new submission or defaulting to the …

posts.author: RheH (Rhema Huggins)
posts.cookedHtml: Within our team, we leverage forms for all of our resourcing requests. I would like to be able to select the column entries that will appear as the item name rather that either seeing new submission or defaulting to the submitter’s name. This will allow us to more readily identify the entries on first glance.

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @RheH

Do you mean you want to set a different default value to the name then the one monday gives it, or that you want the person filling the form to name the item?

posts.author: RheH (Rhema Huggins)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like my form inputs to name the item in a dynamic way where we can combine 2 questions / column inputs to name the item.

posts.author: Karmon (Karen)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Rhema Huggins, jumping in here, I completely see where you’re coming from. Being able to define the item name using a combination of form inputs (like merging two specific answers) would make it way easier to manage and scan through entries, especially when there are lots of submissions. Right now, we have to manually rename each item to something more descriptive, which adds extra steps. Having this level of customization for item naming would really streamline things. Hope this gets more traction!
